comment: B-α 스코프 — parallel spawn_agent 분기만 보존. 미보존 primitive 는 자연어 fallback.

Task.single_pattern: Spawn a worker agent (multi_agent) with the contents of agents/<name>.md as message
Task.parallel_pattern: Spawn N worker agents in sequence (multi_agent slot limit allows up to N concurrent), then wait N times, close_agent N times
Task.model_override: stripped — Codex worker uses default model. model_routing field demoted to information-only.
Task.tool_whitelist: stripped — natural-language guidance only, post-hoc receipt validation

AskUserQuestion.template: ask the user with numbered options: 1) ... 2) ...

TeamCreate.template: Track parallel workers in main session memory under name: ...

TeamGet.template: Refer to main session memory for worker N status

SendMessage.pattern_1_aggregation: N worker single-message spawn → all wait → main aggregates result for next step
SendMessage.pattern_2_sequential: Pass the following result to the next worker as message
